entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Xule version: 3.0.30050 -

[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0094.9526 - 12:02:34.491066 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\CPMD_instance_2024_2025.xml

[xule.ruleDebug] D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\CPMD_instance_2024_2025.xml - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\CPMD_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0094.9526] The element us-gaap:FinanceLeaseLiabilityPaymentsRemainderOfFiscalYear with a value of 796,575 has an end date of 2024-12-31 which is the same as 2024-12-31. Remaining payments for the year should only be used in an annual report if the amount reported is earlier than the period end date. If the amount represents the value of for year one then the element FinanceLeaseLiabilityPaymentsDueNextTwelveMonths should be used to tag this value.
Period :2024-12-31 Unit : USD Dimensions: Decimals: 0
Rule Element Id:9526 Rule version: 29.0.2 - CPMD_instance_2024_2025.xml 2424
